notes: Every queue worker/cron/scheduled job in inventories/*.background-job.json. Vars: schedule or trigger.

steps.title: Implement {name} job
steps.description: Implement {name} at {path} with single-flight protection (no overlapping runs), bounded runtime, and structured start/finish logging.

steps.title: Idempotency and resume for {name}
steps.description: A crashed or retried {name} run must not corrupt or duplicate work: checkpoint progress, make side effects idempotent, define poison-input handling (dead-letter).
acceptance_criteria: kill mid-run then rerun produces correct final state
poison input parks in dead-letter with telemetry, not an infinite retry loop

steps.title: Retry/backoff policy for {name}
steps.description: Explicit retry policy for {name}: max attempts, exponential backoff with jitter, which error classes retry vs fail fast; documented in code.
acceptance_criteria: permanent failure fails fast with telemetry

steps.title: Run-health observability for {name}
steps.description: Emit per-run metrics for {name}: duration, processed count, failure count, last-success timestamp; alert-worthy conditions (N consecutive failures, staleness) breadcrumbed.
acceptance_criteria: a stalled or repeatedly failing job is visible in telemetry without reading logs
